have h3 : ∃ x, f x ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h4 : ∀ x, f x = 0 := by
      intro x
      have h5 : f x = 0 := by
        specialize h x
        simpa using h
      simpa using h5
    contradiction
  rcases h3 with ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩
  have h4 : g 0 = 1 := by
    have eq1 := h₀ x₀ 0
    simp at eq1
    have h5 : f x₀ ≠ 0 := hx₀
    have eq2 : g 0 = 1 := by
      apply (mul_left_inj' h5).mp
      linarith
    exact eq2
  intro x
  have eq1 := h₀ 0 x
  have eq2 : f x + f (-x) = 2 * f 0 * g x := by
    simp at eq1 ⊢
    linarith
  have hfx : -1 ≤ f x ∧ f x ≤ 1 := by
    have h5 := h₂ x
    cases' abs_le.mp h5 with h6 h7
    constructor <;> linarith
  have hfmx : -1 ≤ f (-x) ∧ f (-x) ≤ 1 := by
    have h5 := h₂ (-x)
    cases' abs_le.mp h5 with h6 h7
    constructor <;> linarith
  have hf0 : -1 ≤ f 0 ∧ f 0 ≤ 1 := by
    have h5 := h₂ 0
    cases' abs_le.mp h5 with h6 h7
    constructor <;> linarith
  have h5 : f 0 ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    have h6 : g 0 = 1 := h4
    have eq1 := h₀ 0 0
    simp at eq1
    rw [h] at eq1
    nlinarith [h6]
  have h6 : -2 ≤ f x + f (-x) := by
    linarith [hfx.left, hfmx.left]
  have h7 : f x + f (-x) ≤ 2 := by
    linarith [hfx.right, hfmx.right]
  have h8 : -1 ≤ g x := by
    nlinarith [h6, h7, hf0.left, hf0.right, h5]
  have h9 : g x ≤ 1 := by
    nlinarith [h6, h7, hf0.left, hf0.right, h5]
  apply abs_le.mpr
  constructor <;> linarith

intro x
  have eq1 : f x + f (-x) = 2 * f 0 * g x := by
    specialize h₀ 0 x
    norm_num at h₀
    linarith
  have h3 : -2 ≤ f x + f (-x) := by
    have h4 : |f x| ≤ 1 := h₂ x
    have h5 : |f (-x)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (-x)
    cases' abs_le.mp h4 with h6 h7
    cases' abs_le.mp h5 with h8 h9
    linarith
  have h4 : f x + f (-x) ≤ 2 := by
    have h5 : |f x| ≤ 1 := h₂ x
    have h6 : |f (-x)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (-x)
    cases' abs_le.mp h5 with h7 h8
    cases' abs_le.mp h6 with h9 h10
    linarith
  have h5 : -2 ≤ 2 * f 0 * g x := by
    linarith [eq1, h3]
  have h6 : 2 * f 0 * g x ≤ 2 := by
    linarith [eq1, h4]
  have h9 : |f 0| ≤ 1 := h₂ 0
  have h12 : |g x| ≤ 1 := by
    have h13 : -2 ≤ 2 * f 0 * g x := by linarith [eq1, h3]
    have h14 : 2 * f 0 * g x ≤ 2 := by linarith [eq1, h4]
    have h15 : |(2 * f 0 * g x : ℝ)| ≤ 2 := by
      apply abs_le.mpr
      constructor <;> linarith
    have h16 : |(2 * f 0 * g x : ℝ)| = 2 * |f 0| * |g x| := by
      simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show (2 : ℝ) ≥ 0 by norm_num)]
    rw [h16] at h15
    nlinarith [abs_nonneg (f 0), abs_nonneg (g x)]
  exact h12

have h3 : ∃ x, f x ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h4 : ∀ x, f x = 0 := by

        specialize h x
        simpa using h
      simpa using h5

  have h5 : |f (x₀ + x)| ≤ 1 := by

  have h6 : |f (x₀ - x)| ≤ 1 := by

  have h7 : |f x₀| ≤ 1 := by

  have h8 : f x₀ ≠ 0 := hx₀
